_note: Balancer V3 Router.permitBatchAndCall(PermitApproval[] permitBatch, bytes[] permitSignatures, IAllowanceTransfer.PermitBatch permit2Batch, bytes permit2Signature, bytes[] multicallData) — selector 0x19c6989f. Source: balancer/balancer-deployments v3/tasks/20250307-v3-router-v2. THE dominant V3 Router entry (~92% of recent direct Router tx). Bundles ERC-2612/Permit2 approvals with a multicall of Router self-calls. Decoded via multicall_recurse over the LAST bytes[] arg (multicallData) — each child re-enters the route against the same Router, so bundled swaps/single-token-liquidity keep their concrete ActionBody shapes; children with no manifest (deferred proportional liquidity) are skipped. LIMITATION: the bundled Permit2 batch allowance grant (permit2Batch) is NOT separately surfaced — only the multicall children are analyzed; surfacing the permit2 grant alongside the children needs a dedicated strategy (documented follow-up). Mainnet only.
